options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <setup/hold> # parameter is valid for setup hold ( setup|hold )

options.name: -correlation
options.description: correlation between different parameters of same scope. parameters need to be predefined

options.name: -distribution
options.description: parameter distribution. Can also use custom distribution pre-defined

options.name: -related
options.description: Specifies related information on sub-scope of parameter within specified -scope.For BEOL, the allowed arguments are: 1. <layer name>:capacitance 2. <layer name>:resistance
